summary: Comprehensive testing of Prithvix ERP after Supabase migration completed. Backend APIs 100% functional with correct Supabase data. Frontend core authentication and dashboard features working well. Some navigation and UI interaction issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: KPI cards appear to be loading slowly or showing empty states intermittently

integration_issues.issue: Authentication token not persisting across page navigations, causing redirects to login
Unable to verify farmer detail drawer functionality due to navigation issues
Unable to verify payment modal functionality due to navigation issues

passed_tests: All 24 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
API health endpoint confirms Supabase database
Dealer login with email: dealer@prithvix.com redirects to /dashboard
Staff login with username: staff01 redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard KPI cards display correct Supabase data (12 farmers, 211 visits, Rs 1,57,000 due)
Activity feed loads with 8 items from Supabase
User profile shows correct role (Dealer: Rajesh Patel, Staff: Amit Kumar)
Staff permissions correctly hide staff management from staff users
AI Chat mock responses working via API
Authentication using Bearer token in localStorage
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication token persistence across page navigations to enable proper testing of farmer detail drawer, payment modal, and other page-specific features. The login works but navigation between pages causes authentication loss.
